items.name: Locust Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring a sinister little companion to your avatar with the Locust Shoulder Pet, inspired by ancient swarm legends and eerie insect spirits whispered about in forgotten ruins.

Whether you’re building a dark sorcerer look, cursed wanderer outfit, post-apocalypse survivor, or creepy-cute collector style, this detailed shoulder companion adds a mysterious presence that people notice instantly.

⚡ Why this shoulder pet stands out:
✅ High-detail 3D locust with realistic texture
✅ Fits naturally on your shoulder with most outfits
✅Perfect for cursed, dark fantasy, swarm, or anime-inspired avatar styles
✅ Show love to the Locust crew & creator

Some say it follows powerful hosts… others say it chooses them.
Add your swarm companion today before it disappears into the wind.

items.name: best diamond top hat ever
items.description: Please do not hate on this item. I spend hours of my life creating this masterpiece. No, I didn't just grab a cylinder, copied it and put the diamond texture. I worked really hard making the texture and the model. I counted every polygon, triangles and dot on this item. If i see any hate on this item, My heart will break into pieces, because in my opinion, this item is the most detailed item ever in the 3D modelling history.

items.name: Striped Shirt & Striped Silk Repp Narrow Tie
items.description: Woven with cotton for an oversize silhouette, this shirt features a yarn-dyed striped motif and is detailed with our signature embroidered Pony at the cuff. Exceptional fabrics, signature designs, and fine Italian craftsmanship are the hallmarks of our woven ties. Each one is hand-cut on a perfect 45-degree bias to ensure that it never twists or turns. This version's silk repp cloth was custom-developed with a centuries-old English mill.
